title: Massive sandstorm swallows ancient palace in China's Flaming Mountains
description: A towering wall of dust swept across the Wanfo Palace in the Flaming Mountains of Turpan, Xinjiang, on May 25, engulfing the historic site in a dense red-orange haze. Authorities urged residents and tourists to wear respiratory protection as visibility dropped across the area.

title: Toothless dinosaur that looked like an ostrich is ancient crocodile relative - India Today
